Yoga Is a word difficult to define precisely in English language.
According to dictionary, the term Yoga means conjunction. joining, unity,
unison. combination, junction etc. The word Yoga in ttte general term
is derived from the term Samyoga which literally means a conjunction or
chance. But, in astrology, Yogas are formed In several ways due to
k'lterplan~tary relationship of planets or placement of planets. According
to Vaidyanatha Oeekshlt the established relationship between planets
